description: Development tools for testing neuron behaviors. Use these actions to simulate different scenarios.

increaseMaturity.title: Increase maturity
increaseMaturity.description: Add maturity to this neuron for testing reward disbursement and auto-staking features.

unlockStake.title: Unlock neuron
unlockStake.description: Instantly unlock this neuron, bypassing the dissolve delay. The neuron will be ready for disbursement.

createProposals.title: Create proposals
createProposals.description: Generate sample proposals to test voting functionality and proposal rendering.

addHotkey.title: Add hotkey
addHotkey.description: Add a principal as a hotkey to this neuron. Hotkeys can vote, set followees, refresh voting power, increase stake, and manage Neurons' Fund participation, but cannot dissolve or disburse the neuron.

errors.invalidPrincipal: Please enter a valid principal ID.
errors.failed: Failed to add hotkey. Please try again.
